chapter_title.en: Chapter 76 – The Compassion and the Sympathy

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/51)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/51)
text: تَوَاصَلُوا وَ تَبَارُّوا وَ تَرَاحَمُوا وَ كُونُوا إِخْوَةً بَرَرَةً كَمَا أَمَرَكُمُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Kuleyb Al Saydawi,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Link (with each other), and do good and be compassionate, and become righteous brothers just as Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Commanded (you all to be)’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Muhammad ibn Sinan from Kulayb al-Saydawi from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Maintain good relations among yourselves, do good to each other, be compassionate with one another and be virtuous brothers as Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy, has commanded you to be.”
